bio.Recent_Position: Product Marketing Intern at Intel in Santa Clara, CA
bio.Bios: Hello! My name is Lisa Deng, and I initiated in my fall quarter of my first year here at UCI. In my free time, I love working on projects, whether that's choreographing a dance, photoshopping my dad's face on fruit, or plotting how to take over the world. A fun fact about myself is that I've learned over 25 styles of dance. Ask me about anything above or my love for architecture at recruitment!
